name: Dr. Anjali Mehra
bio: Founded Medini Welfare Society in 2014 after a decade of teaching in under-resourced schools. Leads strategy and partnerships.

name: Rajeev Kulkarni
bio: Oversees day-to-day operations, compliance and the society's annual reporting.

name: Sunita Rao
bio: Manages finances, fund allocation, and donor transparency reports.

name: Imran Sheikh
bio: Designs and runs the learning centers and scholarship programs across partner districts.

name: Priya Nair
bio: Recruits, trains and supports the 200+ volunteers active across Medini's initiatives.

name: Dr. Vikram Joshi
bio: Pediatrician and long-time advisor on the society's health and nutrition initiatives.
